title: verify secure user signup with kvkk consent enforcement
description: Test the POST /auth/v1/signup endpoint to ensure that user signup requires kvkkConsent to be true and returns appropriate errors when missing or false.

title: validate user login and session token retrieval
description: Test the POST /auth/v1/token endpoint for successful login with valid credentials and proper error response for invalid credentials.

title: fetch authenticated user details with valid token
description: Test the GET /auth/v1/user endpoint to retrieve authenticated user details using a valid session token and verify authorization enforcement.

title: fetch and update user profile with authorization
description: Test GET and PATCH /rest/v1/users endpoints to fetch and update user profile data with valid authorization and validate error handling for unauthorized or invalid requests.

title: enforce daily event creation limit and event management authorization
description: Test POST /rest/v1/events to create events respecting daily limits, GET /rest/v1/events for filtering and sorting, and PATCH /rest/v1/events to ensure only owners can update events.

title: manage event participation and prevent duplicates
description: Test POST and DELETE /rest/v1/event_participants for joining and leaving events, including handling duplicate participation attempts.

title: perform qr check-in with authorization
description: Test POST /rest/v1/event_checkins endpoint to perform QR code check-ins with valid authorization and verify unauthorized access is rejected.

title: add and retrieve nested comments with validation
description: Test POST /rest/v1/comments for adding comments and replies, including validation of parent_comment_id, and GET /rest/v1/comments to retrieve comments with nested replies.

title: manage unidirectional friend relationships with validation
description: Test POST and DELETE /rest/v1/friends endpoints to add and remove friends, handle duplicate friendships, and validate friend_id format.

title: retrieve and mark notifications with authorization
description: Test GET and PATCH /rest/v1/notifications endpoints to retrieve recent notifications and mark them as read, including handling unauthorized access and non-existent notification ids.
